Honey never spoils. Archaeologists have found pots of honey in ancient Egyptian tombs that are over 3000 years old and still perfectly edible.
Bananas are berries, but strawberries are not.
A jiffy in computing is sometimes defined as 1/100th of a second.
Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood.
The shortest war on record lasted between 38 and 45 minutes.
The inventor of the Pringles can is buried in one.
A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
There are more possible games of chess than atoms in the observable universe (by many estimates).
Sharks existed before trees, geologically speaking.
The word nerd was popularized by Dr. Seuss in 1950.
A small child could swim through the veins of a blue whale.
Hot water can freeze faster than cold water under some conditions (Mpemba effect).
Bamboo can grow almost three feet in a single day under ideal conditions.
It is illegal to own only one guinea pig in Switzerland because they get lonely.
